faq.q: How many GCC centers does Birst operate in India?
faq.a: Birst operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Birst have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Birst's India GCC presence is in Ahmedabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Birst run in India?
faq.a: Birst runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Birst's India GCCs?
faq.a: Birst's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Birst's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 21 leaders at Birst's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
